test_cases.input_summary: Single-location documentary interview day, 4-person crew, 2 contributors, community centre venue with specific access constraints
test_cases.notes: Clean structure, all sections populated. CONFIRM flags correctly placed for missing phone numbers. Schedule timings realistic for documentary interviews.

test_cases.input_summary: Two-location exterior shoot day with travel between sites, 6-person crew, drone operator with CAA restrictions, winter weather
test_cases.notes: Handled multi-location schedule well. Correctly flagged drone restrictions and weather contingency. Travel time between locations was estimated and flagged for confirmation.

test_cases.input_summary: Minimal input: production title, date, one location, 2 crew, no hospital or catering info provided
test_cases.notes: Graceful degradation — all missing safety-critical fields flagged as CONFIRM BEFORE DISTRIBUTION. Did not invent details. Applied sensible default schedule offsets.
